attributes.title: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] JVM & Thread Pool
attributes.description: Deep dive into JVM heap memory and thread pool performance for Oracle WebLogic Server instances. Monitors heap utilization, thread states, and request processing capacity.

Detailed JVM and thread pool analysis for WebLogic Server:
- JVM heap memory usage and utilization trends
- Thread pool composition (active, idle, hogging)
- Thread pool throughput and pending request queues
- Per-server breakdown for capacity planning
